Sans Serif, 9.75pt;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;GammaCorrection:False;BackColor:White;BackColor2:White;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style139{AlignHorz:Near;}Style137{}Inactive{ForeColor:InactiveCaptionText;GradientMode:None;BackColor:ButtonShadow;GammaCorrection:False;}Style148{}Style146{AlignHorz:Near;}Style132{}Style103{}Style105{}Style121{Trimming:Character;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignHorz:Near;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Footer{AlignHorz:Center;ForeColor:AliceBlue;Border:Inset,,1, 1, 1, 1;GradientMode:None;BackColor:DarkOliveGreen;GammaCorrection:False;}OddRow{}Style126{}FilterBar{Font:Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt;Border:Inset,,1, 1, 1, 1;BackColor:AntiqueWhite;}Style115{Trimming:Character;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;AlignHorz:Center;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style145{AlignHorz:Near;}Style110{}Style140{AlignHorz:Near;}Editor{}Heading{BackColor2:DarkSlateGray;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;AlignHorz:Center;Border:Flat,ControlDark,0, 1, 0,
